pi_items.source: Task is defective. setup_task.ps1 is entirely missing from the task directory, meaning the TailwindTraders-Frontend repository is never instantiated. The base environment only creates TailwindTraders.
Task is defective. Since setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 are missing, these folders and files are never created in the environment, and their absence/presence cannot be evaluated.
Task is defective. The base source code (src/App.js and package.json) is never created due to the missing setup script.
Verified via verifier.py logic which explicitly checks the submitted gitignore_content for the substrings node_modules, dist, and either .log or npm-debug.

privileged_info_summary: Discovered that the task is critically defective. The setup and export scripts (setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1) referenced in the task.json hooks are missing from the environment. Consequently, the target repository TailwindTraders-Frontend and its expected polluted files are never instantiated, and the verifier will perpetually fail because the necessary result JSON is never generated. The only verifiable claim is the required .gitignore patterns (node_modules, dist, .log), which match the logic explicitly defined in verifier.py.
